title: AWS DMS Replication Task
description: Schema for an AWS Database Migration Service replication task resource, representing a data migration task between source and target database endpoints.

SourceEndpointArn.description: The ARN of the source endpoint.

TargetEndpointArn.description: The ARN of the target endpoint.

ReplicationInstanceArn.description: The ARN of the replication instance.

TableMappings.description: Table mappings in JSON format for the replication task.

ReplicationTaskSettings.description: Settings for the replication task in JSON format.

Status.description: The status of the replication task.

ReplicationTaskArn.description: The ARN of the replication task.

ReplicationTaskCreationDate.description: The date the replication task was created.

ReplicationTaskStartDate.description: The date the replication task first started.

FullLoadProgressPercent.description: The percent complete for the full load migration task.

ElapsedTimeMillis.description: The elapsed time of the task, in milliseconds.

TablesLoaded.description: The number of tables loaded for this task.

TablesLoading.description: The number of tables currently loading.

TablesQueued.description: The number of tables queued for this task.

TablesErrored.description: The number of errors that have occurred during this task.

FreshStartDate.description: The date the replication task was started.

Endpoint.description: A source or target database endpoint for migration.

EngineName.description: The type of engine for the endpoint.
